title: Conduct geotechnical site investigations
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Conduct geotechnical site investigations demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria.

elements.title: Prepare for on-site operations

pcs.text: Identify the job, location, work instructions, appropriate sampling and test procedures and safety requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify the job, location, work instructions, appropriate sampling and test procedures and safety requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify the job, location, work instructions, appropriate sampling and test procedures and safety requirements.

pcs.text: Identify site hazards and identify appropriate personal protective equipment (PPE) and safety procedures that are specified for the job and materials used
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify site hazards and identify appropriate personal protective equipment (PPE) and safety procedures that are specified for the job and materials used?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify site hazards and identify appropriate personal protective equipment (PPE) and safety procedures that are specified for the job and materials used.

pcs.text: Record description of the job to be undertaken, compare with specification and report any variations
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record description of the job to be undertaken, compare with specification and report any variations?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record description of the job to be undertaken, compare with specification and report any variations.

pcs.text: Arrange for the collection, checking, stowing and transport of all tools, equipment and materials required at the site
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Arrange for the collection, checking, stowing and transport of all tools, equipment and materials required at the site?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Arrange for the collection, checking, stowing and transport of all tools, equipment and materials required at the site.

pcs.text: Ensure site access requirements, such as entry permits and safety inductions, have been organised
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Ensure site access requirements, such as entry permits and safety inductions, have been organised?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure site access requirements, such as entry permits and safety inductions, have been organised.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare for on-site operations

elements.title: Arrange excavation of boreholes, test pits and/or trenches

pcs.text: Identify the sampling/testing location
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify the sampling/testing location?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify the sampling/testing location.

pcs.text: Excavate or oversee excavation to the sampling and testing depth, minimising disturbance and potential contamination of the site
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Excavate or oversee excavation to the sampling and testing depth, minimising disturbance and potential contamination of the site?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Excavate or oversee excavation to the sampling and testing depth, minimising disturbance and potential contamination of the site.

pcs.text: Identify materials and record changes of strata, test results and other relevant information
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify materials and record changes of strata, test results and other relevant information?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify materials and record changes of strata, test results and other relevant information.

pcs.text: Ensure materials from different strata are kept separate
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Ensure materials from different strata are kept separate?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure materials from different strata are kept separate.

pcs.text: Terminate the excavation at the appropriate depth and record the reason for termination
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Terminate the excavation at the appropriate depth and record the reason for termination?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Terminate the excavation at the appropriate depth and record the reason for termination.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Arrange excavation of boreholes, test pits and/or trenches

elements.title: Conduct site sampling

pcs.text: Prepare and check sampling equipment and materials
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare and check sampling equipment and materials?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare and check sampling equipment and materials.

pcs.text: Take disturbed and undisturbed samples in accordance with workplace methods and procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Take disturbed and undisturbed samples in accordance with workplace methods and procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Take disturbed and undisturbed samples in accordance with workplace methods and procedures.

pcs.text: Label and record samples in accordance with workplace methods and procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Label and record samples in accordance with workplace methods and procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Label and record samples in accordance with workplace methods and procedures.

pcs.text: Recognise and record details of site conditions that may impact on sample integrity or site interpretation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Recognise and record details of site conditions that may impact on sample integrity or site interpretation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Recognise and record details of site conditions that may impact on sample integrity or site interpretation.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Conduct site sampling

elements.title: Conduct testing

pcs.text: Prepare and conduct pre-use checks of test equipment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare and conduct pre-use checks of test equipment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare and conduct pre-use checks of test equipment.

pcs.text: Perform, or assist with performing, tests in accordance with test methods or workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Perform, or assist with performing, tests in accordance with test methods or workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Perform, or assist with performing, tests in accordance with test methods or workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Record test data in accordance with test methods or workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record test data in accordance with test methods or workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record test data in accordance with test methods or workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Recognise obvious errors or atypical data and take appropriate corrective actions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Recognise obvious errors or atypical data and take appropriate corrective actions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Recognise obvious errors or atypical data and take appropriate corrective actions.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Conduct testing

elements.title: Finalise site operations

pcs.text: Backfill or seal any excavation and ensure that it is left in a safe and uncontaminated condition
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Backfill or seal any excavation and ensure that it is left in a safe and uncontaminated condition?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Backfill or seal any excavation and ensure that it is left in a safe and uncontaminated condition.

pcs.text: Reinstate surfaces disturbed by sampling or testing
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Reinstate surfaces disturbed by sampling or testing?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Reinstate surfaces disturbed by sampling or testing.

pcs.text: Clean all equipment (and vehicle, as necessary) avoiding environmental damage, stormwater contamination or spread of pests
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clean all equipment (and vehicle, as necessary) avoiding environmental damage, stormwater contamination or spread of pests?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean all equipment (and vehicle, as necessary) avoiding environmental damage, stormwater contamination or spread of pests.

pcs.text: Check all equipment and materials prior to re-stowing them for safe transport
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check all equipment and materials prior to re-stowing them for safe transport?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check all equipment and materials prior to re-stowing them for safe transport.

pcs.text: Handle and transport samples in accordance with established practices
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Handle and transport samples in accordance with established practices?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Handle and transport samples in accordance with established practices.

pcs.text: Notify appropriate site personnel on completion of investigations and prior to leaving site
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Notify appropriate site personnel on completion of investigations and prior to leaving site?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Notify appropriate site personnel on completion of investigations and prior to leaving site.

pcs.text: Check serviceability of test equipment before storage on return to base
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check serviceability of test equipment before storage on return to base?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check serviceability of test equipment before storage on return to base.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E5: Finalise site operations

elements.title: Maintain records

pcs.text: Maintain equipment records in accordance with established practices
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Maintain equipment records in accordance with established practices?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Maintain equipment records in accordance with established practices.

pcs.text: Complete site safety plans, equipment logs and test reports in accordance with workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Complete site safety plans, equipment logs and test reports in accordance with workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Complete site safety plans, equipment logs and test reports in accordance with workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Maintain confidentiality of workplace information
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Maintain confidentiality of workplace information?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Maintain confidentiality of workplace information.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E6: Maintain records

elements.title: Maintain a safe work environment

pcs.text: Use safe work procedures and PPE to ensure personal safety and that of others
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Use safe work procedures and PPE to ensure personal safety and that of others?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Use safe work procedures and PPE to ensure personal safety and that of others.

pcs.text: Minimise environmental impacts of testing/sampling and generation of waste
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Minimise environmental impacts of testing/sampling and generation of waste?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Minimise environmental impacts of testing/sampling and generation of waste.

pcs.text: Collect and/or dispose of all waste in accordance with workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Collect and/or dispose of all waste in accordance with workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Collect and/or dispose of all waste in accordance with workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E7: Maintain a safe work environment
